<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<beans xmlns="http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans"
xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
xsi:schemaLocation="
http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans
http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans/spring-beans.xsd">
<!-- cfg dependent spring bean -->
<bean id="Itime" class="java.time.LocalTime" factory-method="now"/>
<!-- Cfg target spring bean -->
<bean id="wmg" class="com.nt.sbeans.Wish Message Generator">
<property name="time" ref="/time"/> <!-- Setter injection cfg -->
</bean>
</beans>

reply.text:
Fixed XML: corrected bean ids, class name (removed spaces), and property reference.

Updated `WishMessageGemerater/src/com/nt/cfgs/applicationContext.xml`:

```xml
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<beans xmlns="http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans"
       xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
       xsi:schemaLocation="
         http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans
         http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans/spring-beans.xsd">

    <!-- cfg dependent spring bean -->
    <bean id="time" class="java.time.LocalTime" factory-method="now"/>

    <!-- Cfg target spring bean -->
    <bean id="wmg" class="com.nt.sbeans.WishMessageGenerator">
        <property name="time" ref="time"/>
    </bean>

</beans>
```
